stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What should be considered when lined up on the departure runway and there are thunderstorms in the vicinity?

options.a: The gain control (rotary switch 3) should be set to minimum (MIN) to ensure that all returns are displayed.
options.b: The radar should be tilted up (UP) (rotary switch 2) to check for any significant precipitation on the climb-out path.
options.c: The ground clutter suppression (GND CTLR SPRS) switch should be set to OFF to eliminate confusion with weather returns.
options.d: The radar should be tilted down (DN) (rotary switch 2) to ensure ground returns are displayed to verify that the system is working.
